perFrameCode: // I'm not sure whether a motion vector trail length of 0.005 or 0 is better matrix effect
// Adding the solar filter is nice, with decay at about .95 to decrease the amount of solarization
// I had the motion vectors amount on max, but my framerate is too low, so I decrease it max it up if you have a better screenard
bass_thresh = if(equal(jfr,29),0,bass_thresh);  //always a beat after a completed jump
dy = dy + jump*0.2*cos(3.141*jfr/18); //gives the neo jump effect
